problem_text_cn: 3-1 图3-1中的 $A_{3}BCD_{3}$ 是一条长轨道，其中 $A_{3}B$ 是斜面段，$CD_{3}$ 是水平段，$BC$ 是与 $A_{3}B$ 和 $CD_{3}$ 都相切的一小段圆弧。一个小球与斜面段各处摩擦因数相同，小球与水平段各处摩擦因数也都相同，但这两个摩擦因数未必相同。小球依次由 $A_{1}$，$A_{2}$，$A_{3}$ 从静止开始滑下，最后分别停留在 $D_{1}$，$D_{2}$，$D_{3}$ 点。已知 $h_{2}-h_{1}=0.30\,\text{m}$，$h_{3}-h_{2}=0.48\,\text{m}$，$\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}=1.5\,\text{m}$，试求 $\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}$ 长度。
problem_text_en: 3-1 The track $A_{3}BCD_{3}$ in Figure 3-1 consists of an inclined segment $A_{3}B$, a horizontal segment $CD_{3}$, and a small circular arc $BC$ that is tangent to both $A_{3}B$ and $CD_{3}$. The coefficient of friction between a small ball and the inclined segment is the same everywhere; the coefficient of friction between the ball and the horizontal segment is also the same everywhere, but these two friction coefficients are not necessarily equal. The ball starts from rest successively at points $A_{1}$, $A_{2}$, $A_{3}$, and finally comes to rest at points $D_{1}$, $D_{2}$, $D_{3}$ respectively. Given $h_{2}-h_{1}=0.30\,\text{m}$, $h_{3}-h_{2}=0.48\,\text{m}$, and $\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}=1.5\,\text{m}$, find the length $\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}$.
problem_solution_cn:
解 小球在斜面段所受合力沿斜面向下，大小恒定，记为 $F$；小球在水平段所受合力水平朝右，大小恒定，记为 $f$。$A_{1}B$ 段 $F$ 作正功，$CD_{1}$ 段 $f$ 作负功，两者抵消。$A_{2}A_{1}$ 段 $F$ 所作正功与 $D_{1}D_{2}$ 段 $f$ 所作负功抵消，$A_{3}A_{2}$ 段 $F$ 所作正功与 $D_{2}D_{3}$ 段 $f$ 所作负功抵消。将斜面倾角记为 $\theta$，则有

$$ F\frac{h_{2}-h_{1}}{\sin\theta}=f\overline{D_{1}D_{2}},\quad F\frac{h_{3}-h_{2}}{\sin\theta}=f\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}, $$

两式相除，即得

$$ \overline{D_{2}D_{3}}=\frac{h_{3}-h_{2}}{h_{2}-h_{1}}\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}=2.4\,\text{m}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution The net force on the ball on the inclined segment is constant, directed down the incline, denoted $F$; the net force on the ball on the horizontal segment is constant, directed horizontally to the right, denoted $f$. The positive work done by $F$ on segment $A_{1}B$ and the negative work done by $f$ on segment $CD_{1}$ cancel each other. The positive work done by $F$ on segment $A_{2}A_{1}$ cancels the negative work done by $f$ on segment $D_{1}D_{2}$, and the positive work done by $F$ on segment $A_{3}A_{2}$ cancels the negative work done by $f$ on segment $D_{2}D_{3}$. Denoting the inclination angle of the slope by $\theta$, we have

$$ F\frac{h_{2}-h_{1}}{\sin\theta}=f\overline{D_{1}D_{2}},\quad F\frac{h_{3}-h_{2}}{\sin\theta}=f\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}, $$

Dividing the two equations gives

$$ \overline{D_{2}D_{3}}=\frac{h_{3}-h_{2}}{h_{2}-h_{1}}\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}=2.4\,\text{m}. $$
img_cn: 图944展示了一条名为$A_{3}BCD_{3}$的长轨道，包含$A_{3}B$斜面段、一小段圆弧$BC$和$CD_{3}$水平段。图中标注了不同位置$h_{1}$、$h_{2}$、$h_{3}$和$\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}$、$\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}$距离。
img_en: Figure 944 shows a long track named $A_{3}BCD_{3}$, consisting of a sloping segment $A_{3}B$, a small arc $BC$, and a horizontal segment $CD_{3}$. Different positions $h_{1}$, $h_{2}$, $h_{3}$ and distances $\overline{D_{1}D_{2}}$, $\overline{D_{2}D_{3}}$ are marked.
